notes:
Review confidence: 15% chance of missed bug.
Least confident areas: interaction between sign_sync and tokio runtime edge cases (spawn_blocking, single-threaded runtimes).
Would raise confidence if: integration test with real local-signing backend through the adapter, tested from both sync and async contexts.

Dedup: 10 duplicates closed, 20 unique findings remain open.

Summary by priority (open only):
  P0: 3 (InvalidUri misuse, byte format unspecified, new() doc omits errors)
  P1: 10 (Debug missing, ed25519 workspace pin, RSA size enforcement, panic payload, tests, sign() panic undocumented, umbrella absence, into_inner leakage, spawn_blocking thread)
  P2: 4 (msg shadow, doc example ignore, try_sign docs, signature version lock)
  P3: 4 (re-export SecretError, RSA name, 2 decisions worth defending)

Positive decisions: y7er.7 (sign_sync bridge pattern), y7er.11 (algorithm validation at construction)
title: Review: secretx-signature 2026-06-16
